title: New Hampshire council votes down $100M Bitcoin bonds
summary: State representative Keith Ammon said the New Hampshire executive council's vote against Bitcoin-backed bonds was “short-sighted,” urging the body to reconsider the measure.

title: Backpack joins race for 24/7 stock markets with tokenized equities
summary: The launch comes as tokenized stocks become one of the fastest-growing corners of crypto, with exchanges and traditional finance firms racing to expand 24/7 trading.

title: Stocks Eke Out Gains as SK Hynix Rallies in Debut: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks mildly higher in the countdown to the earnings season, with SK Hynix Inc. jumping in its debut and the market parsing the latest geopolitical developments.

title: SK Hynix Climbs 15% After Record $26.5 Billion US Offering
summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s American depositary receipts jumped 15% above their offering price, after the South Korean memory chipmaker raised $26.5 billion in the largest-ever US listing by a foreign company.

title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.

title: Metaplanet Announces Joint Study to Bring Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit to Japan
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Metaplanet Announces Joint Study to Bring Bitcoin-Backed Digital Credit to Japan
Metaplanet is taking its Bitcoin strategy beyond treasury accumulation, launching a study to explore tokenized, Bitcoin-backed credit products that could reshape Japan's debt market.

title: Xbox CEO Joins Fed AI Jobs Task Force Days After Announcing 3,200 Layoffs
summary: Asha Sharma will advise the Federal Reserve on AI’s impact on jobs and productivity as Xbox undergoes the biggest restructuring in its history.

title: Trump Won't Sign Housing Bill With CBDC Ban—Will It Become Law Tonight Anyway?
summary: Unless President Trump vetoes the bill, it will become law at midnight, banning the Federal Reserve from developing a CBDC until 2031.

title: Empery Digital offloads 1,400 bitcoins to help fund AI pivot, pay debt
summary: Empery Digital used part of the proceeds for a 25% stake in an AI data center campus project.

title: Kraken to relaunch its mobile app with agentic trading and advice at the center
summary: Kraken is adding autonomous AI agents capable of monitoring markets and suggesting trades for users.
